Internal memo: Hiraya Foods Holdings Corporation (the Company) — Disclosure posture and data handling for week of 01 July 2026.
The Company’s audited 2025 annual report (Form 17-A) was publicly filed through the Exchange disclosure portal on 18 April 2026; no new material risk factors were added beyond those already disclosed.
A press release dated 30 May 2026 regarding a pilot store in Bacolor was posted on our website and shared with media; this is non-material and does not require a current report.
HR confirms all 2025 NRB Form 2316 equivalents and generic onboarding forms are on file; this memo contains no personal data and attachments exclude employee identifiers.
Payroll auto-debit arrangements with Isla Rural Bank, Ltd. continue under the 2024 framework; the sample account number 0000-XXXX-1234 in training slides is a placeholder and not a live account.
The Company’s share repurchase authorization expired as disclosed in our public Form 17-C dated 12 January 2026; there are no active buyback mandates at present.
Supplier masterfile references (e.g., SUP-00000 and TAX 000-000-000-0000) in accounting templates are dummy values and not associated with any individual or customer record.
Our Insider Trading and Disclosure Policy follows SRC materiality standards and prohibits selective disclosure; the policy was last circulated in December 2025.
Transfer agency updates from Pandan Transfer Agents Corporation regarding portal maintenance were posted broadly; these are operational notices and not trading signals.
Finance has circulated a draft timetable for an unannounced rights offering; until the board resolution and the current report are filed, treat this as MNPI and observe an insider blackout from 02–16 July 2026.
CSR communications about the coastal cleanup initiative were published on the Company website and social channels; these are community updates and not disclosure events.
Media coverage of the CEO’s industry talk reused information already included in our 17-A and prior 17-C filings; no supplemental disclosure is required.
The NRB’s routine 2024 inquiry into a subsidiary’s withholding compliance was closed and posted on the municipal notice board; there is no impact on our publicly stated outlook.
For queries or pre-clearance requests, use compliance@hirayafoods.example and hr@hirayafoods.example role mailboxes; do not transmit scans of IDs or bank documents via unsecured channels.
